description: Player opens a campaign puzzle for the first time (fresh state, not already completed). Top of conversion funnel.
Player solves a campaign puzzle (fresh win, not a revisit). Includes puzzle id, difficulty, size, and hints used.
Player clicks the Hint button during a campaign puzzle. Includes hint depth (escalation level) and puzzle id.
Player confirms the Restart dialog during a campaign puzzle. Churn/frustration signal.
Player visits the tutorial page. Entry point into the new-player onboarding funnel.
Player reaches the final step of the tutorial ('done' action). New-player conversion milestone.
Player opens the Daily Beacon page and sees the calendar view. Top of the daily funnel.
Player selects a date from the Daily Beacon calendar and enters the puzzle view.
Player solves the daily puzzle (fresh win). Includes date, streak count, and hints used.
Player clicks the Hint button during a daily puzzle. Includes hint depth and the puzzle date.
A new campaign region banner is shown to the player on the home page. Progression milestone.
Player confirms the Reset Progress action from the home page footer. Strong churn/frustration signal.
